summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 16 hydrated pull requests. This shard is not a dedupe cluster, no shared canonical is present, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, instant and low-signal closeout are disabled, and the preflight artifact reports no security-sensitive job refs. Open PRs are kept as independent inventory items; already-closed PRs are recorded as skipped keep_closed actions.
